content: react-force-graph wraps the imperative force-graph family (2D canvas, 3d-force-graph ThreeJS/WebGL, VR/AR variants) as 4 standalone React packages using react-kapsule to adapt imperative Kapsule engines into declarative React components; physics via d3-force-3d/ngraph. reagraph is a separate from-scratch React+WebGL (three.js under the hood) graph viz library. Both are relevant prior art/competitors but the project's ADRs mandate building a bespoke R3F renderer extracted from codebase-memory-mcp rather than adopting either as a dependency.
